reports.name: v0 / UI prompt quality
reports.what: buildV0PromptMarkdown on thin vs solid Master Plans (no v0 API call — prompt grounding only)
notes: thin prompt chars=1062
solid prompt chars=1487

solid preview:
# v0 UI pass (concise)

App: Help beginners build daily habits with streak accountability.
Project type: Web App

## Pages (first pass — max 8 routes)
- **Login** (`/login`) — email/password
- **Home** (`/home`) — today habits + check-in buttons
- **Habit detail** (`/habits/[id]`) — history + streak
- **Stats** (`/stats`) — weekly chart
- **Settings** (`/settings`) — reminders, theme

## Visual system
- Palette: #0B1220 background, #22C55E success/check, #F8FAFC text, #334155 borders.
- Typography: Source Sans 3 / IBM Plex Sans.
- Nav: sidebar on Web App desktop; density comfortable.
- Components: large check buttons, streak badge, calm cards.
- shadcn + Tailwind. Avoid Nebulla IDE chrome.
thin looks generic/weak=true
